name: Toy Barn with Animal Figurines - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Wooden Farm Playset, Classic Style, Gender Neutral
description:
Kids love to imagine they're in charge of a farm, raising and feeding animals. Teach them more with the Toy Barn with Animal Figurines from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. The wooden toy barn has a classic style with colorful accents and functional doors, and an additional silo is a nice realistic touch. Inside, you'll find a host of barnyard animals that can stand on their own. Your child will delight in feeding them from the hay bales, wrangling them within the fence or walking them up the side ladder. When playtime is over, they all head into the barn for easy storage.

Celebrate the everyday with Hearth & Hand — created exclusively for Target in collaboration with Magnolia, a home and lifestyle brand by Chip & Joanna Gaines. Built upon our shared commitment to giving back to our communities, these pieces reveal the beauty of everyday moments shared with family and friends.
